printed.name: Breaststroke
printed.setup: Start in Breaststroke Prep 1 position (page 79), elbows bent by sides of body, thumbs in straps, hands in line with shoulders

movement.inhale: Lift trunk, straighten arms foward, circle arms around to sides of body
movement.exhale: Bend arms, lower trunk, return to start position

cues: Maintain external rotation of shoulders as body is lowered and elbows bend during final phase of movement
